crime.value: Murder at the Red House; victim found dead; central question concerns the method of escape and the killer's identity
crime.quote: CHAPTER III. Two Men and a Body

closed_world.value: The Red House and its grounds; a contained estate where suspects are limited to those present

resolution.value: Detective Antony Gillingham solves the crime through observation of physical details; specifically by analyzing shadow movement and door mechanics to determine the killer's actions
resolution.quote: The shadow on the wall! I was looking at the shadow on the wall... That explains why I was surprised afterwards

investigator.value: Antony Gillingham, an amateur detective/gentleman investigator who arrives at the scene and methodically solves the mystery
investigator.quote: CHAPTER II. Mr. Gillingham Gets Out at the Wrong Station

_meta.source: mystery_database/new_sources/The Red House Mystery, by A. A. Milne.pdf
_meta.filename: The Red House Mystery, by A. A. Milne.pdf
_meta.title: The Red House Mystery, by A. A. Milne
